_notes: Recaps post here after games wrap. Generate via tools/msm-recap.sh — appends a new entry with title, recap, score, division, round, posted_at.

recaps.title: Southlake Durham shuts down Northwest 7–2
recaps.recap: Southlake Durham's arms were dialed in Tuesday morning, with Hudson K and Lincoln B each spinning two scoreless innings and striking out three apiece to blank 6th-Northwest Worthington 7–2 at The Parks at Texas Star. Jase R did the damage at the plate with a double and an RBI, while the bullpen didn't allow an earned run all game.

recaps.title: Grapevine Faith edges Timberview in 17–13 slugfest
recaps.recap: Grapevine Faith held off a hard-charging Timberview Hawks squad 17–13 in a wild, 30-hit affair Tuesday at 2520 Oak Grove Loop S — the Hawks actually out-hit their opponents 15 to 7 but couldn't overcome a pair of big innings from Grapevine Faith. Casen R led Timberview with three hits, and Jack M's double sparked a 4-run third that briefly gave the Hawks the lead.

recaps.title: Big third lifts MSM Aledo past Timberview 16–4
recaps.recap: MSM Aledo MMS 6th blew the game open with a 14-run third inning to top the Timberview Hawks 16–4 Tuesday morning at The Parks at Texas Star. Beckham M was the big bat in the frame — three RBI on a single — with Mason B and Logan M each driving in a pair to cap a 19-hit team effort.
